Describe the problem and solution.

## Validation

- [ ] `swift-format` lint passes
- [ ] App builds for the iOS Simulator
- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] iPhone layout checked
- [ ] iPad layout checked, if UI changed
- [ ] Documentation updated, if setup or behavior changed

## Contract and security notes

List any OpenCode/FluidVoice API assumptions and confirm that no secrets or private data are included.
